title: Saxophonist (17) wows with first solo concert
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Point High School learner...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Point High School learner Matth Domingo (17) had his first-ever solo concert at the Bravo Lounge, Garden Route Casino, in Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Point High School learner Matth Domingo (17) had his first-ever solo concert at the Bravo Lounge, Garden Route Casino, in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The saxophone player, already making waves in the local music scene, delivered a spellbinding performance on Sunday, 15 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Joining Matth for this unforgettable evening were celebrated artist Angie Meyer, the dynamic Rhapsody Band and crowd favourite Deep Down Under, creating an electric atmosphere of soulful melodies and vibrant rhythms.","html":"Joining Matth for this unforgettable evening were celebrated artist Angie Meyer, the dynamic Rhapsody Band and crowd favourite Deep Down Under, creating an electric atmosphere of soulful melodies and vibrant rhythms."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The star of the night, Matth, demonstrated undeniable talent and stage presence, proving he is one to watch.","html":"The star of the night, Matth, demonstrated undeniable talent and stage presence, proving he is one to watch."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Watch a video below:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether it was the smooth sounds of jazz or upbeat contemporary tunes, Matth's saxophone mastery captivated the audience from start to finish.","html":"Whether it was the smooth sounds of jazz or upbeat contemporary tunes, Matth's saxophone mastery captivated the audience from start to finish."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Josey Domingo, Matth's proud father and manager, shared his excitement after the concert."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Matth is an allrounder. He plays hockey for Point High School and Eden Hockey and in his free time, he studies music. To see him shine tonight was a dream come true,” said Josey.","html":"“Matth is an allrounder. He plays hockey for Point High School and Eden Hockey and in his free time, he studies music. To see him shine tonight was a dream come true,” said Josey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While balancing sport and music, Matth is already planning for a bright future.","html":"While balancing sport and music, Matth is already planning for a bright future."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“I want to further my studies in both music and sport,” Matth shared enthusiastically."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Domingo family also revealed thrilling plans for the future: Matth and his team will be travelling to the United Kingdom in July 2025.","html":"The Domingo family also revealed thrilling plans for the future: Matth and his team will be travelling to the United Kingdom in July 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He will be in Grade 11 at Point next year.","html":"He will be in Grade 11 at Point next year."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The tour marks another milestone in the young musician’s blossoming career and promises to expand his reach internationally. During the December holidays he will be in Riversdale."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To book Matth to play at a venue, contact him (067 638 8957).","html":"To book Matth to play at a venue, contact him (067 638 8957)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He also has a concert scheduled for 15 February. Call him for more information.","html":"He also has a concert scheduled for 15 February. Call him for more information."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Josey Domingo, Angie Meyer and Matth Domingo at the Bravo Lounge.  Neville and Natalie Wildermans. BELOW: Ninian Pick.Messrs Blou and Kannemeyer.","html":"Josey Domingo, Angie Meyer and Matth Domingo at the Bravo Lounge.
 Neville and Natalie Wildermans. BELOW: Ninian Pick.
Messrs Blou and Kannemeyer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
